    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    G

    getBrokerUrl() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
    Returns the broker URL this adapter is configured for.
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.DeviceResource
    Returns a single device including its current state (FR-07).
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RoomResource
    Returns a single room by ID.
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RuleResource
    Returns a single rule by ID.
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
    Returns a single scene including all device states.
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ScheduleResource
    Returns a single schedule by ID.
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
    Returns a single user by ID.
    getById(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.VacationModeResource
    Returns a single vacation mode by ID.
    getConflicts(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ConflictResource
    Returns all detected automation conflicts.
    getDashboard(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.EnergyResource
    Returns the energy consumption dashboard for a user (FR-14).
    getLogs(Long, Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ActivityLogResource
    Returns activity log entries.
    getProtocolName() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTIntegrationService
    Returns the identifier of the active protocol (e.g., "MOCK", "MQTT").
    getProtocolName() - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Returns a short identifier of the protocol implementation (e.g., "MOCK", "MQTT").
    getProtocolName() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    getProtocolName() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
     
    getSentCommands() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
    Returns an immutable snapshot of all commands sent through this adapter.
    getStatus() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.IoTResource
    Returns the current IoT integration status.
